name: Claw Memory System
description: OpenClaw tool plugin bridge for facts, exact search, migration checks, and workspace bootstrap.

pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run repo-owned bridge commands.

repoPath.description: Optional override for the claw-memory-system repository root.

workspaceDir.description: Optional default OpenClaw workspace path. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workspace.

openclawHome.description: Optional default OpenClaw home path. Defaults to ~/.openclaw.

openclawBin.description: OpenClaw executable name used for deep integration checks.

adminHost.description: Host used by the auto-started local admin HTTP process.

adminPort.description: Port used by the auto-started local admin HTTP process.

autoStartAdmin.description: Automatically bootstrap the workspace and start the local admin HTTP process when the gateway starts.

autoTurnCapture.description: Enable queue-only autonomous turn capture when lifecycle wiring is available. Defaults off for release safety.

autoTurnQueueOnly.description: When autonomous turn capture is enabled, only queue pending candidates and do not write structured memory directly.

turnCaptureMinConfidence.description: Minimum classifier confidence for direct handling decisions. Lower-confidence items should remain queued or ignored.

batchGovernanceEnabled.description: Whether batch governance automation is enabled.

batchGovernanceEvery.description: Recommended cadence for autonomous batch governance.

notes: Full functionality requires memory-lancedb-pro as the active semantic memory slot.
Recommended tested stack for v0.1.0: openclaw >= 2026.2.0, claw-memory-system = 0.1.0, memory-lancedb-pro >= 1.1.0-beta.8 (repo: https://github.com/CortexReach/memory-lancedb-pro).
Use this plugin for structured memory, queue-first autonomous capture, governance, exact search, bootstrap, and diagnostics.
If installed from a package copy, ensure the bundled repo contains src/, scripts/, schemas/, and webapp/.
When the OpenClaw gateway is running, the management console is served under /plugins/claw-memory-system.
